summary: Property Tracker app — both backend and frontend tested end-to-end. Backend: 13/13 pytest cases passed (list, type/status filters, CRUD, _id excluded, 404s). Frontend (mobile viewport 390x844): Buy/Rent segmented control, status filter chips with counts, property cards, detail screen (status pipeline, edit/delete/back, star rating), Add Property form (input fields, save), and Compare tab (3 favourites rendered side-by-side) all working. New property created via UI persisted (4→5 cards). Status change on detail persisted (Liked filter count went 0→1→2 across flow). No red-screen errors. Only minor non-blocking React Native web warnings ('shadow*' and 'props.pointerEvents' deprecation in some upstream libs — not in app code).

react_native_issues.issue: Upstream library still uses deprecated shadow* style props (RN-web warns to use boxShadow). Originates from third-party components, not app StyleSheet definitions. Non-blocking; surfaces only as console warning.
props.pointerEvents is deprecated on web; should use style.pointerEvents. Comes from a dependency, not app code. Non-blocking console warning.

action_items: No blocking issues. Optional: investigate which dependency triggers shadow*/pointerEvents deprecation warnings (likely react-native-keyboard-controller or expo-image) and upgrade when a fix lands.

Delete confirmation uses Alert.alert which on web shows a system dialog — not auto-testable via Playwright. Manual verification recommended for delete-from-detail flow (API delete itself is verified via pytest).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py correctly excludes MongoDB _id via projection ({'_id': 0}) on all reads.
All env vars come from .env (MONGO_URL, DB_NAME, EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL) — no hardcoded URLs.

All interactive elements have testID attributes (segment-buy/rent, filter-*, property-card-{id}, set-status-*, add-property-button, save-button, edit-button, delete-button, back-button, input-*, compare-segment-*, compare-col-*).
PUT endpoint uses partial-update pattern correctly (filters out None values, preserves untouched fields, refreshes updated_at).
Text components properly wrap all text. StyleSheet.create used throughout. No HTML primitives.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created — pytest cleans up its TEST_ records via teardown; Playwright-created 'TEST_Playwright Loft' (id 71f477e7-...) was cleaned up via DELETE after the run. The 7 originally seeded properties (4 buy + 3 rent) remain intact.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_properties.py cover all 5 endpoints (list, get, post, put, delete) including 404s and partial updates. Frontend Playwright flow exercised: home Buy/Rent toggle, filter chips, card tap → detail → status change, Add property modal → save → list updates, Compare tab columns. Mobile viewport 390x844. Backend URL: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL in /app/frontend/.env.
